name: WikiJS
description: Make documentation a joy to write
compose:
name: slashnode-wikijs
services:
  server:
    image: linuxserver/wikijs:2.5.314
    container_name: wikijs
    restart: unless-stopped
    networks:
      - slashnode
    user: '1000:1000'
    volumes:
      - server_data:/data
      - server_repo:/app/wiki/data/repo
      - server_config:/config
    ports:
      - 127.0.0.1:9182:3000
networks:
  slashnode:
    external: true
volumes:
  server_data:
    name: slashnode-wikijs_server_data
  server_repo:
    name: slashnode-wikijs_server_repo
  server_config:
    name: slashnode-wikijs_server_config
